name: Lapco Holdings Limited
summary: Lapco Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides environmental hygiene services in Hong Kong. The company offers cleaning, pest management, waste management and recycling, and landscaping services to a range of venues, including commercial buildings, markets, restaurants, and academic institutions, as well as streets, cultural, leisure, recreational, and residential premises. It serves government departments, property management companies, and other corporations in the private sector. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong. Lapco Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Gold Cavaliers International Limited.
